description: Top-down arcade alien shooter with retro Press-Start-2P pixel font, canvas rendering, requestAnimationFrame game loop, and localStorage high-score persistence. Defender/Galaga/Space-Invaders feel.
qualityNotes: Hand-curated from mchatai.com/hub/alien-abduction (publisher GI1GHQ7w). Working canvas + RAF game loop with 'Press Start 2P' retro font, dark space background, localStorage persistence. Use as starting point; model may modify gameplay parameters but should preserve the canvas + game-loop scaffold.
